note: CoW Protocol native-ETH order placement. CoWSwapEthFlow.createOrder(EthFlowOrder.Data order) payable, selector 0x322bba21. This is the ON-CHAIN path users take to sell native ETH on CoW (an EOA cannot EIP-712-presign a WETH order without first wrapping, so ethflow wraps msg.value to WETH and places the order on-chain). Covers BOTH active mainnet ethflow contracts: 0xba3cb449bd2b4adddbc894d8697f5170800eadec (current, ~99% of ethflow) + 0x40a50cf069e992aa4536211b23f286ef88752187 (v1, minor but still active). EthFlowOrder.Data has NO sellToken field — the sell token is ALWAYS the wrapped native token (WETH 0xc02aaa39b223fe8d0a0e5c4f27ead9083c756cc2 on mainnet), so sell is baked. msg.value = order.sellAmount + order.feeAmount (the native ETH the user spends); sell_amount mirrors the off-chain Order mapping (= order.sellAmount, fee dropped). -> amm sign_intent_order with OnchainTx meta.nature (same economic intent as the off-chain Order — place a CoW limit order selling X for min Y to recipient, expiring at validTo — but established on-chain rather than by signature; meta.nature distinguishes it). venue=cow_swap, settlement=GPv2Settlement 0x9008d19f58aabd9ed0d60971565aa8510560ab41 (where the wrapped order settles). 1st-party: github.com/cowprotocol/ethflowcontract src/CoWSwapEthFlow.sol (createOrder) + src/libraries/EthFlowOrder.sol (Data struct).
